theme.rationale: Corporate/Professional SaaS dashboard needs a structured, formal feel with high legibility. Deep navy sidebar provides authority and grounding, while white main areas and vibrant semantic colors (amber, green, red) offer clear functional feedback.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-outfit font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-outfit font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900

layout.sidebar: w-64 fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-50 flex flex-col bg-[#0F172A] text-slate-300
layout.header: h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-8 bg-white border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-40
layout.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm p-6
layout.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-8

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.success: bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20 focus:border-orange-500

badges.pending: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-amber-100 text-amber-800
badges.approved: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800
badges.rejected: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-red-100 text-red-800
badges.processing: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-blue-100 text-blue-800

components.upload_zone: border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded-lg p-12 text-center bg-slate-50 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:border-orange-400 transition-all cursor-pointer flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 2 for clean, professional look. Use orange-500 for primary actions, slate-400 for inactive/secondary.

logo.description: Orange gear icon with 'spatial+' text and tagline 'create efficiencies'

pages.name: Landing / Onboarding
pages.description: Hero section with a professional backdrop, highlighting the 'Spatial+' branding. Clean CTA to 'Connect Google Account'.
pages.layout_rules: Full height split screen or centered card over background image with dark overlay (bg-slate-900/80).

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: High-level metrics and activity. Uses 'Control Room' dense grid approach. 4 summary cards taking top row, activity feed and secondary charts below.

pages.name: Invoice Manager
pages.description: Upload zone (dashed borders) at top. Processing stepper indicating current state. Data table below with realistic mock data and status badges.

pages.name: Approval Center
pages.description: List or table of pending approvals. Explicit action buttons (Approve/Edit/Cancel) with semantic coloring (Emerald/Slate/Red).

pages.name: Meeting Summarizer
pages.description: Two primary Tabs (Upload Audio, Paste Transcript). Shadcn tabs component. Processing stepper. Historical table of past summaries.

pages.name: HR Connect
pages.description: Integration card showing 'Connected' or 'Disconnected'. Modal/Dialog component for webhook URL and secret entry.

pages.name: Settings
pages.description: Vertical tabs or simple stacked sections. Connected accounts overview, approved vendor management table, notification toggles.

testing.required_attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid. Examples: data-testid='login-button', data-testid='invoice-upload-zone', data-testid='approve-invoice-btn'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React with Vite, Tailwind CSS, React Router, and install lucide-react, axios.
Add 'Outfit' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' fonts to index.html and configure tailwind.config.js.
Set up layout component with fixed left sidebar (bg-[#0F172A]) and top header.
Implement Shadcn/ui primitives for Buttons, Cards, Dialogs, Tables, Tabs.
Use ONLY the media URLs provided in this JSON. DO NOT use placeholder services like placehold.it.
Apply generous padding (p-6 or p-8) inside cards.
Ensure the application strictly follows the color palette (amber/green/red for statuses, deep navy for sidebar).
Populate all pages with the realistic mock data provided.
